debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
γ : Type u_3
δ : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
μ : Measure α
mβ : MeasurableSpace β
mγ : MeasurableSpace γ
mδ : MeasurableSpace δ
inst✝⁷ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁶ : StandardBorelSpace β
inst✝⁵ : Nonempty β
inst✝⁴ : StandardBorelSpace γ
inst✝³ : Nonempty γ
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace δ
inst✝¹ : Nonempty δ
inst✝ : IsFiniteMeasure μ
X : α → β
Y : α → γ
Z : α → δ
hX : Measurable X
hY : Measurable Y
hZ : Measurable Z
h : CondIndepFun (MeasurableSpace.comap Z inferInstance) ⋯ X Y μ
⊢ CondIndepFun (MeasurableSpace.comap Z inferInstance) ⋯ X (fun ω => (Y ω, Z ω)) μ

failed_attempts: simpa [CondIndepFun] using (h.prod_right hZ)
simpa [CondIndepFun, Kernel.IndepFun] using h.prod_right hX hY hZ
simpa using h.prod_right hZ
simpa using h.prod_right hZ
simpa [CondIndepFun, Kernel.IndepFun] using h.prod_right hY hZ
simpa [CondIndepFun, Kernel.IndepFun, condDistrib] using h.prod_right hZ
simpa [CondIndepFun, Kernel.IndepFun, ProbabilityTheory.CondIndepFun] using h.prod_right hZ
simpa [CondIndepFun] using (Kernel.IndepFun.prod_right hX hY hZ h)

simpa [CondIndepFun, Kernel.condDistribProdRight hX hY hZ] using
    (Kernel.IndepFun.prod_right hX hY hZ h)
simpa [Function.comp] using h.prod_right hZ
simpa using h.prod_right hZ

have h' : X ⟂ᵢ[Z, hZ; μ] (fun ω ↦ (Y ω, Z ω, Z ω)) := by
    simpa [Prod.mk.eta, Prod.map] using h.prod_right hX (hY.prod_mk hZ) hZ
  exact (CondIndepFun.of_prod_right (ε := δ) (T := Z) hZ h').trans <| by
    simpa [Prod.mk.eta] using (CondIndepFun.of_prod_right (ε := δ × δ) (T := fun ω ↦ (Z ω, Z ω)) hZ h')
simpa using h.prod_right hX hY hZ
simpa using (h.prod_right (hY.prod_mk hZ) hZ)
simpa using h.prod_right hX hY hZ

have h' : X ⟂ᵢ[Z, hZ; μ] (fun ω ↦ (Y ω, (fun ω ↦ Z ω) ω)) := by
    simpa using (Kernel.IndepFun.prod_right (κ := μ.condKernel hZ) (μ := μ.map Z) h)
  exact (CondIndepFun.of_prod_right (X := X) (Y := Y) (Z := Z) (T := fun ω ↦ Z ω) hZ h').trans ?_
  · simpa using (CondIndepFun.refl_right (X := X) (Z := Z) hZ)
simpa using h.prod_right hX hY hZ
simpa [CondIndepFun, hZ] using h.prod_right (hY := hY) (hZ := hZ)
simpa [CondIndepFun] using (Kernel.IndepFun.prod_right hX hY hZ h)
simpa [CondIndepFun] using h.indepFun.prod_right hY hZ
simpa [CondIndepFun, Kernel.IndepFun, Measure.condKernel] using h.prod_right hY hZ
simpa using h.prod_right hZ
simpa [CondIndepFun, Kernel.condIndepFun, hZ] using h.prod_right hZ

have h' : X ⟂ᵢ[Z, hZ; μ] (fun ω ↦ (Y ω, (fun ω ↦ Z ω) ω)) := by
    simpa using h.prod_right (T := fun ω ↦ Z ω)
  simpa using h'
simpa [CondIndepFun, Kernel.condIndepFun] using (Kernel.IndepFun.prod_right hX hY hZ h)
simpa [CondIndepFun] using h.prod_right hZ

simpa [show (fun ω ↦ (Y ω, Z ω)) = fun ω ↦ (Y ω, (fun ω ↦ Z ω) ω) from rfl] using
    (h.prod_right hZ)
simpa using h.prod_right hZ
simpa [CondIndepFun, Kernel.IndepFun, hZ, hY] using h.prod_right (g := Z) (hg := hZ)
simpa [Prod.mk.eta] using h.prod_right (hY := hY) (hZ := hZ)

simpa [condIndepFun_iff, Function.comp] using
    (h.prod_right (hY.prod_mk hZ) (by simpa using hZ))
simpa [condIndepFun_iff] using h.prod_right hZ
